description: A demo carbon asset referencing a diversified bundle of verified offset credits from voluntary carbon markets. The asset does not claim fixed yield and is presented for batch-level traceability and disclosure review.

docs.label: Project bundle overview
docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Summarizes illustrative project types, vintages, and registry references.

docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Describes demo verification and monitoring assumptions.

docs.note: Demo document, not a legal instrument. Explains illustrative credit usage and retirement handling.
